title: Warmup: Headers
description: Whispers to /api/challenges. Can you find anything interesting?
hint: Listen to the whispers above the body; metadata often speaks first.

title: Caesar Salad
hint: An old general favors a simple march; the steps are small and uniform.

title: Hidden in Plain Sight
hint: It hums in sixty‑four tones; sometimes it ends with padding.

title: Brute Force Basics
description: We hashed a 5-character lowercase-alphanumeric token with SHA-256. Find the hash in the /api/challenges response, recover the token by brute force, and submit as CTF{<token>}.
hint: A hex trail rides the margins of your calls; five small steps reveal the way.

title: VM Lemur
description: A tiny VM checks an input against an encoded blob: LzErDgEYBBkQLRoIMkRBX1IQ. Reverse the routine to recover the flag. Static checker: /vm/lemur.js
hint: Peel a layer of sixty‑four before crossing an XOR bridge with a jungle guide.

title: Buffer Basics
description: A classic overflow. In real events you'd exploit it if not a pot; here, guess wisely ;)
hint: One extra byte can tip the scales.

title: Vigenère Vintage
description: Ciphertext: LXFOPVEFRNHR. Recover the plaintext with a classic polyalphabetic cipher and submit as CTF{<plaintext_lowercase>}.
hint: The tune repeats; squeeze the clue you’re given.

title: Vector Secrets
description: A harmless-looking site graphic might be hiding more than it shows… Who knows, maybe the terminal lends a hand? 👀 Recover the hidden message and submit it as flag{...}.
hint: Vectors carry layers and notes; read between the tags.

title: Little Bobby Tables
description: There’s a mock login at /sqli-demo that builds SQL using string concatenation. Log in as admin without the password and retrieve the hidden secret.
hint: Quotes and comments can turn checks into tautologies.

title: Puzzle
description: Use the in-app terminal to explore a sandboxed filesystem. Find a file and read the content, then submit it as-is.
hint: Listing flags reveal the unseen; modes decide what you can read.

title: Multi Layer Encryption
description: A message has been transformed through multiple encoding layers. Each layer reveals the next. Find the original flag. Format: flag{...}

title: Weak RSA
description:
RSA is only secure when implemented correctly. Can you recover the hidden message?

n = ?
e = 65537
c = ?

flag format: flag{...}
